user.title: Connect to Ashly Device
user.description: Enter the connection details for your Ashly audio processor.

data_description.host: IP address or hostname of the device

discovery_confirm.title: Ashly Device Discovered
discovery_confirm.description: An Ashly {model} was found at {host}. Enter credentials to complete setup.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate
reauth_confirm.description: Authentication failed for {name}. Please enter updated credentials.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Ashly Device
reconfigure.description: Update connection settings for your Ashly device.

data_description.host: IP address or hostname of the device

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the device. Verify the IP address and that the device is powered on.
error.invalid_auth: Authentication failed. Check your username and password (defaults: admin / secret).
error.no_mac: Could not retrieve a MAC address from the device — required to register it uniquely.

abort.unique_id_mismatch: The device at this address is different from the one originally configured.
abort.not_ashly_device: The discovered device is not an Ashly audio processor.

data_description.poll_interval: How often to poll the device for state changes (5-300 seconds)

default_credentials.title: Ashly device is using factory-default credentials
default_credentials.description: The Ashly device at {host} is still using the factory-default username and password (admin / secret). This is a security concern on a networked audio device — anyone on the LAN can change presets, mute zones, or alter mixer routing. To resolve: change the password in the device's AquaControl Portal, then update Home Assistant via **Settings → Devices & services → Ashly Audio → Configure**.

device_unreachable.title: Ashly device has been unreachable
device_unreachable.description: Home Assistant has not been able to reach the Ashly device at {host} for several polls. The most common causes are: the device powered off, a network/cable disruption, or the device's IP address changing (e.g. via DHCP renewal). If the IP has changed, update it via **Settings → Devices & services → Ashly Audio → Configure**. This issue will clear automatically on the next successful poll.

device_error.message: Operation on the Ashly device failed: {error}

preset_not_found.message: Preset {preset!r} not found on {host}. Available presets: {available}

not_ashly_device.message: Device {device_id} is not an Ashly device

entry_not_loaded.message: Ashly entry for device {device_id} is not loaded
